text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is where the<n>strongest of each
generation make<n>themselves known. It is the
perfect<n>race to demonstrate my royal<n>authority!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
An obstacle yet bars my path—Admire<n>Vega. She's
a worthy foe, and my<n>future fans erupt as we lock
eyes!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: At last, ladies and gentlemen, Originsof the Centurial Overlord Act Ibegins.
